div.b: Append-Only 書き込み + 楽観的ロック

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 320px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1612px; margin-left: 1510px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.font:
リクエスト:
{
stream_id: "order-ord-123",
events: [{event_type, payload, metadata}],
expected_version: 4 // 楽観的ロック
}
楽観的ロック:
- expected_version == current_version → OK
- expected_version != current_version → 409 VERSION_CONFLICT
- expected_version == -1 → 新規ストリーム作成
保証:
- UPDATE/DELETE 禁止 (Append-Only)
- UNIQUE(stream_id, version) 制約
- sequence は IDENTITY (グローバル連番)

div.div:
スナップショット & Read Model 投影
Events → Snapshots (N件毎に作成)
→ Kafka (非同期転送) → Read Model (CQRS Projector)

div.font:
スナップショット作成
POST /api/v1/streams/:id/snapshot
{snapshot_version, aggregate_type, state}
状態復元の高速化:
最新 Snapshot + (snapshot_version 以降の Events)
→ 集約状態を再構築

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1697px; margin-left: 2212px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Kafka 転送
Topic: k1s0.system.eventstore.event.published.v1
Key: stream_id (順序保証)
保証: at-least-once
Read Model 投影
Consumer が Kafka から読み取り
Read DB へ投影 (CQRS パターン)

div.font:
event_streams (id TEXT PK, aggregate_type, current_version)
events (sequence IDENTITY PK, stream_id FK, version, event_type, payload JSONB, metadata JSONB)
snapshots (id TEXT PK, stream_id FK, snapshot_version, state JSONB)
